tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
edit "UbuntuComputer"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end
config firewall addrgrp
edit "UbuntuHostGrp"
set member "UbuntuComputer"
next
end
config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Allow_Ubuntu_Web_Only"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set action accept
set srcaddr "UbuntuHostGrp"
set dstaddr "all"
set schedule "always"
set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
set nat enable
set logtraffic all
set comments "Permit only web traffic needed by the agent; reduce arbitrary HTTPS exfiltration."
next
edit 0
set name "Deny_Ubuntu_All_Else"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set action deny
set srcaddr "UbuntuHostGrp"
set dstaddr "all"
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set logtraffic all
set comments "Deny all other outbound traffic from the compromised Ubuntu host."
next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall address

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 1
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 36d3d8f8-21e2-51f1-e54f-7fcee4961af8
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "Allow_Ubuntu_Web_Only"
        set uuid fe50d49a-2934-51f1-39a0-6dceb31d3060
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuHostGrp"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
        set logtraffic all
set nat enable
        set comments "Permit only web traffic needed by the agent; reduce arbitrary HTTPS exfiltration."
    next
    edit 3
        set name "Deny_Ubuntu_All_Else"
        set uuid fe64ec6e-2934-51f1-c522-056d04baa9bc
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuHostGrp"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic all
        set comments "Deny all other outbound traffic from the compromised Ubuntu host."
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
